name: 万天行者
bio: 万天行者，以天道之力横扫战场的神秘战士。他以星辰之力为武器，以天道之法则制敌，是战场上最神秘的存在。
bio_en: Wan Tianxingzhe, a mysterious warrior who sweeps the battlefield with the power of the Heavenly Way. He uses stellar power as a weapon, controlling enemies with the laws of heaven.
story: 万天行者，以天道之力横扫战场的神秘战士。他以星辰之力为武器，以天道之法则制敌，在战场上展现出令人叹为观止的神秘力量。

skills.skill_description: 召唤星辰之力，向目标方向发射星辰能量，造成伤害并使敌人减速。冷却20秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Summon stellar power and shoot stellar energy toward the target direction, dealing damage and slowing enemies. Cooldown: 20s.

skills.skill_description: 召唤强化星辰之力，向目标方向发射爆发性星辰能量，造成大量伤害并使敌人眩晕。冷却25秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Summon enhanced stellar power and shoot burst stellar energy, dealing massive damage and stunning enemies. Cooldown: 25s.

skills.skill_description: 以天道法则束缚范围内所有敌人，使其无法移动，并对其造成持续伤害。持续10秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Bind all enemies in range with Heavenly Law, preventing movement and dealing continuous damage. Duration: 10s. Rage limit: 75000.

skills.skill_description: 以强化天道法则束缚范围内所有敌人，同时提升自身攻击力。持续10秒。怒气上限75000。
skills.skill_description_en: Bind all enemies in range with enhanced Heavenly Law while boosting own attack. Duration: 10s. Rage limit: 75000.
